stemHtml: Which of the following speed schedules, applicable to the same aeroplane, represents the highest cost index?

options.a: Climb: 340 kt / M 0.80, Cruise: M 0.80, Descent: M 0.80/340 kt
options.b: Climb: 296 kt / M 0.80, Cruise: M 0.80, Descent: M 0.80/288 kt
options.c: Climb: 280 kt / M 0.80, Cruise: M 0.80, Descent: M 0.80/294 kt
options.d: Climb: 255 kt / M 0.80, Cruise: M 0.80, Descent: M 0.80/245 Kt
